descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos defeat Richmond Sockeyes 4-3 in overtime in Centennial Cup playoff game, forcing seventh game.
descriptionLong: The Humboldt Broncos scored in overtime on April 28, 1987 to defeat the Richmond Sockeyes 4-3, keeping their Centennial Cup playoff series alive. Bill McDougall scored twice for Humboldt, including the overtime winner, while Paul and Dave Tomlinson scored for Richmond. Coach Orland Kurtenbach cited two key mistakes—penalties to Tony Bobbitt and Steve Jaques—as deciding factors. The series was forced to a seventh game in Humboldt on Wednesday night.
